company_name: LG에너지솔루션 ESS pivot / tax credit quality
evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for EV_TO_ESS_CAPACITY_REDEPLOYMENT_KOREA; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: LGES ESS pivot is Stage 2 evidence, but ex-subsidy OPM, utilization, FCF, and customer diversification gate Stage 3. Sources: round_187.md Reuters LGES Q2 profit / demand slowdown.

evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for SODIUM_ION_NEXTGEN_MATERIALS; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Sodium-ion partnership is Stage 2 option evidence. Stage 3 waits for commercial customer, supply contract, revenue, OPM, and cost advantage. Sources: round_187.md Reuters LG Chem / Sinopec sodium-ion partnership.

evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for HYDROGEN_FUEL_CELL_INFRA_KOREA; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Doosan fuel-cell path can move toward Stage 3 only if SOFC sales, customers, recurring service, OPM, FCF, and price path align. Sources: round_187.md Ceres SOFC mass production in Korea.

evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for HYDROGEN_FUEL_CELL_INFRA_KOREA; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Hyundai hydrogen CAPA is macro Stage 2 evidence for the value chain; utilization, customers, revenue, and margins gate Stage 3. Sources: round_187.md Reuters Hyundai hydrogen fuel cell plant.

evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for SOLAR_US_LOCALIZATION_SUPPLYCHAIN; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Qcells localization is Stage 2 evidence, but customs/UFLPA clearance, normal operation, margin, and FCF gate Stage 3. Sources: round_187.md AP Qcells Georgia investment.

evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for BATTERY_CONTRACT_CANCELLATION_4C; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Large battery supply cancellations are hard 4C until replacement demand, utilization, and revenue recovery are proven. Sources: round_187.md Reuters LGES Ford cancellation, round_187.md Reuters Freudenberg cancellation.

company_name: SK IE Technology separator sale review / SK On loss
evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for SEPARATOR_EV_DEMAND_CYCLE; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Separator exposure is capped when EV slowdown, parent losses, and sale review break utilization visibility. Sources: round_187.md Reuters SK Innovation considering SKIET sale.

evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for SOLAR_US_LOCALIZATION_SUPPLYCHAIN; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: U.S. localization does not create Green if customs detention and component supply-chain disruption stop normal production. Sources: round_187.md Reuters Qcells furlough due stalled shipments.

evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for WIND_POLICY_PERMITTING_RISK; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Wind supply-chain candidates need project permits, financing, delivery revenue, and margin; permit/lease halt is a hard policy overlay. Sources: round_187.md AP offshore wind permit pause, round_187.md Guardian offshore wind lease suspension.

company_name: Aricell battery factory fire safety overlay
evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for BATTERY_SAFETY_INDUSTRIAL_ACCIDENT_OVERLAY; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Fatal battery factory safety and quality failure is a hard 4C overlay for battery manufacturing, materials, and equipment candidates. Sources: round_187.md Reuters Aricell fire police finding, round_187.md Reuters CEO sentence.

company_name: Mercedes EV battery supplier disclosure trust overlay
evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for EV_BATTERY_TRANSPARENCY_REGULATORY_OVERLAY; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Battery supplier transparency and consumer-trust risk must remain visible for cell makers and EV customers. Sources: round_187.md Reuters Mercedes battery supplier disclosure fine.

company_name: 롯데에너지머티리얼즈·솔루스첨단소재 copper foil EV demand cycle
evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for COPPER_FOIL_EV_DEMAND_CYCLE; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Copper foil is not Green before customer visibility, utilization, ASP/spread, OPM, and FCF are visible. Sources: round_187.md copper foil watch/red rule.

evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for ELECTROLYTE_CAPA_SUPPLYCHAIN; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Electrolyte CAPA can route research, but customer, utilization, OPM, and FCF are required before Stage 3. Sources: round_187.md electrolyte CAPA rule.

evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for BATTERY_EQUIPMENT_CAPEX_CYCLE; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Battery equipment can become Stage 2~3 only when customer CAPEX turns into orders, shipment revenue, OP/EPS, and repeat demand. Sources: round_187.md battery equipment capex cycle rule.

company_name: 성일하이텍·새빗켐 battery recycling unit economics watch
evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for BATTERY_RECYCLING_UNIT_ECONOMICS; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: Recycling needs recovery volume, metal-price sensitivity, unit economics, OPM, and FCF before Stage 3. Sources: round_187.md battery recycling unit economics rule.

evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for BATTERY_TAX_CREDIT_QUALITY_OVERLAY; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
notes: R3 keywords can rally first, but price-only or subsidy-only moves need 4B cooling before they are mislabeled Stage 3. Sources: round_187.md Stage 4B early conversion rule.

company_name: R3 Loop 12 OpenDART detail confidence reference
evidence_summary: Round187 R3 Loop-12 Korea battery/EV/green case for DISCLOSURE_CONFIDENCE_CAP; calibration-only and focused on contract/customer/utilization, ex-subsidy OPM, FCF, policy/customs/safety risk, and price path.
false_positive_reason: opendart_list_only; media_only; mou_loi; detail_missing; customer_missing; utilization_unknown
notes: R3 Loop 12 requires detail fetch and forbids invented missing contract, utilization, subsidy, safety, and OPM fields. Sources: round_187.md OpenDART detail and no-invented-fields rule.
